metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins for design, development, and productivity

plugins.name: pencil-design-tools
plugins.description: AI-powered mockup generation and SwiftUI code conversion using Pencil.dev

plugins.name: swift-ui-prototyper
plugins.description: Generate SwiftUI prototypes with stub data and live preview for PRD documentation

plugins.name: superpowers-gstack
plugins.description: Setup and configure the Superpowers + GStack combined workflow for any project type

plugins.name: macos-distribution
plugins.description: End-to-end Developer ID signing, notarization, stapling, and packaging (DMG/ZIP) for macOS apps distributed outside the Mac App Store
